The codebase is at version 2.192 (commit: a7a20ba1). ## Issue to Resolve [BUG]: Can't search for "Backups" options by search feature in Settings ### Checked for duplicates? - [X] This issue is not a duplicate ### Does it also happen in the desktop version? - [X] This bug does not occur in the latest version of Anki Desktop ### What are the steps to reproduce this bug? [Settings] > tap [Search...] input box >Input "back" ### Expected behaviour "Backups" and its sub-options appear as search results. - The case of inputting "syn" for "Sync": ### Debug info ```text AnkiDroid Version = 2.19beta2 (2dab92e5214d6e21ebe2dd3a05e20a04ed7a9858) Backend Version = 0.1.40-anki24.06.3 (24.06.3 d678e39350a2d243242a69f4e22f5192b04398f2) Android Version = 11 (SDK 30) ProductFlavor = full Manufacturer = OPPO Model = CPH2013 Hardware = qcom Webview User Agent = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 11; CPH2013 Build/RKQ1.200903.002; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/128.0.6613.127 Mobile Safari/537.36 ACRA UUID = 5e59349c-ede4-4942-91b7-199dcf1342c0 FSRS Enabled = true Crash Reports Enabled = true ``` ### (Optional) Anything else you want to share? The issue occurs in 2.17.6, too. ### Research - [X] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue - [X] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting)) ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/HeaderFragment.kt` - `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml` - `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_backup_limits.xml` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above. Focus on: - Understanding the root cause of the issue - Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem - Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
 17→
 18→import android.os.Bundle
 19→import android.view.View
 20→import android.view.ViewGroup
 21→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
 22→import androidx.preference.Preference
 23→import androidx.preference.PreferenceFragmentCompat
 24→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchConfiguration
 25→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchPreference
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.BuildConfig
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 29→import com.ichi2.compat.CompatHelper
 30→import com.ichi2.preferences.HeaderPreference
 31→import com.ichi2.utils.AdaptionUtil
 32→
 33→class HeaderFragment : PreferenceFragmentCompat() {
 34→    private var selectedHeaderPreference: HeaderPreference? = null
 35→    private var selectedHeaderPreferenceKey: String = DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 36→    override fun onCreatePreferences(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, rootKey: String?) {
 37→        setPreferencesFromResource(R.xml.preference_headers, rootKey)
 38→
 39→        selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = savedInstanceState?.getString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF) ?: DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 40→
 41→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 42→
 43→        requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(R.string.pref_backup_limits_screen_key)
 44→            .title = CollectionManager.TR.preferencesBackups()
 45→
 46→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_advanced_screen_key).apply {
 47→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
 48→                isVisible = false
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→
 52→        if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(requireContext())) {
 53→            setDevOptionsVisibility(true)
 54→        }
 55→
 56→        configureSearchBar(
 57→            requireActivity() as AppCompatActivity,
 58→            requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key).searchConfiguration
 59→        )
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    private fun highlightHeaderPreference(headerPreference: HeaderPreference) {
 63→        if (!(activity as Preferences).hasLateralNavigation()) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→        selectedHeaderPreference?.setHighlighted(false)
 67→        // highlight the newly selected header
 68→        selectedHeaderPreference = headerPreference.apply {
 69→            setHighlighted(true)
 70→            selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = this.key
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    override fun onPreferenceTreeClick(preference: Preference): Boolean {
 75→        highlightHeaderPreference(preference as HeaderPreference)
 76→        return super.onPreferenceTreeClick(preference)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
 80→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
 81→        outState.putString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF, selectedHeaderPreferenceKey)
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    override fun onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 85→        super.onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState)
 86→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun onStart() {
 90→        super.onStart()
 91→        requireActivity().setTitle(R.string.settings)
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 95→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 96→        // use the same fragment container to search in case there is a navigation container
 97→        requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key)
 98→            .searchConfiguration
 99→            .setFragmentContainerViewId((view.parent as? ViewGroup)?.id ?: R.id.settings_container)
100→    }
101→
102→    fun setDevOptionsVisibility(isVisible: Boolean) {
103→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_dev_options_screen_key).isVisible = isVisible
104→    }
105→
106→    companion object {
107→        private const val KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF = "selected_header_pref"
108→        private const val DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER = "generalScreen"
109→
110→        fun configureSearchBar(activity: AppCompatActivity, searchConfiguration: SearchConfiguration) {
111→            with(searchConfiguration) {
112→                setActivity(activity)
113→                setBreadcrumbsEnabled(true)
114→                setFuzzySearchEnabled(false)
115→                setHistoryEnabled(true)
116→
117→                index(R.xml.preferences_general)
118→                index(R.xml.preferences_reviewing)
119→                index(R.xml.preferences_sync)
120→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_sync_server)
121→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_sync)
122→                index(R.xml.preferences_notifications)
123→                index(R.xml.preferences_appearance)
124→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_buttons)
125→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_appearance)
126→                index(R.xml.preferences_controls)
127→                index(R.xml.preferences_accessibility)
128→            }
129→
130→            // Some preferences and categories are only shown conditionally,
131→            // so they should be searchable based on the same conditions
132→
133→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
134→            if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(activity)) {
135→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_dev_options)
136→                /** From [DevOptionsFragment.initSubscreen] */
137→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
138→                    searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.dev_options_enabled_by_user_key))
139→                }
140→            }
141→
142→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
143→            if (!AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
144→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_advanced)
145→            }
146→
147→            /** From [NotificationsSettingsFragment.initSubscreen] */
148→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
149→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_vibrate_key))
150→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_blink_key))
151→            }
152→
153→            /** From [AdvancedSettingsFragment.removeUnnecessaryAdvancedPrefs] */
154→            if (!CompatHelper.hasScrollKeys()) {
155→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.double_scrolling_gap_key))
156→            }
157→
158→            searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.user_actions_controls_category_key))
159→        }
160→    }
161→}
162→

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
 17→
 18→import android.os.Bundle
 19→import android.view.View
 20→import android.view.ViewGroup
 21→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
 22→import androidx.preference.Preference
 23→import androidx.preference.PreferenceFragmentCompat
 24→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchConfiguration
 25→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchPreference
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.BuildConfig
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 29→import com.ichi2.compat.CompatHelper
 30→import com.ichi2.preferences.HeaderPreference
 31→import com.ichi2.utils.AdaptionUtil
 32→
 33→class HeaderFragment : PreferenceFragmentCompat() {
 34→    private var selectedHeaderPreference: HeaderPreference? = null
 35→    private var selectedHeaderPreferenceKey: String = DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 36→    override fun onCreatePreferences(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, rootKey: String?) {
 37→        setPreferencesFromResource(R.xml.preference_headers, rootKey)
 38→
 39→        selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = savedInstanceState?.getString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF) ?: DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 40→
 41→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 42→
 43→        requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(R.string.pref_backup_limits_screen_key)
 44→            .title = CollectionManager.TR.preferencesBackups()
 45→
 46→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_advanced_screen_key).apply {
 47→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
 48→                isVisible = false
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→
 52→        if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(requireContext())) {
 53→            setDevOptionsVisibility(true)
 54→        }
 55→
 56→        configureSearchBar(
 57→            requireActivity() as AppCompatActivity,
 58→            requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key).searchConfiguration
 59→        )
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    private fun highlightHeaderPreference(headerPreference: HeaderPreference) {
 63→        if (!(activity as Preferences).hasLateralNavigation()) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→        selectedHeaderPreference?.setHighlighted(false)
 67→        // highlight the newly selected header
 68→        selectedHeaderPreference = headerPreference.apply {
 69→            setHighlighted(true)
 70→            selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = this.key
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    override fun onPreferenceTreeClick(preference: Preference): Boolean {
 75→        highlightHeaderPreference(preference as HeaderPreference)
 76→        return super.onPreferenceTreeClick(preference)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
 80→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
 81→        outState.putString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF, selectedHeaderPreferenceKey)
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    override fun onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 85→        super.onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState)
 86→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun onStart() {
 90→        super.onStart()
 91→        requireActivity().setTitle(R.string.settings)
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 95→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 96→        // use the same fragment container to search in case there is a navigation container
 97→        requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key)
 98→            .searchConfiguration
 99→            .setFragmentContainerViewId((view.parent as? ViewGroup)?.id ?: R.id.settings_container)
100→    }
101→
102→    fun setDevOptionsVisibility(isVisible: Boolean) {
103→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_dev_options_screen_key).isVisible = isVisible
104→    }
105→
106→    companion object {
107→        private const val KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF = "selected_header_pref"
108→        private const val DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER = "generalScreen"
109→
110→        fun configureSearchBar(activity: AppCompatActivity, searchConfiguration: SearchConfiguration) {
111→            with(searchConfiguration) {
112→                setActivity(activity)
113→                setBreadcrumbsEnabled(true)
114→                setFuzzySearchEnabled(false)
115→                setHistoryEnabled(true)
116→
117→                index(R.xml.preferences_general)
118→                index(R.xml.preferences_reviewing)
119→                index(R.xml.preferences_sync)
120→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_sync_server)
121→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_sync)
122→                index(R.xml.preferences_notifications)
123→                index(R.xml.preferences_appearance)
124→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_buttons)
125→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_appearance)
126→                index(R.xml.preferences_controls)
127→                index(R.xml.preferences_accessibility)
128→                index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)
129→            }
130→
131→            // Some preferences and categories are only shown conditionally,
132→            // so they should be searchable based on the same conditions
133→
134→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
135→            if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(activity)) {
136→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_dev_options)
137→                /** From [DevOptionsFragment.initSubscreen] */
138→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
139→                    searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.dev_options_enabled_by_user_key))
140→                }
141→            }
142→
143→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
144→            if (!AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
145→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_advanced)
146→            }
147→
148→            /** From [NotificationsSettingsFragment.initSubscreen] */
149→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
150→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_vibrate_key))
151→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_blink_key))
152→            }
153→
154→            /** From [AdvancedSettingsFragment.removeUnnecessaryAdvancedPrefs] */
155→            if (!CompatHelper.hasScrollKeys()) {
156→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.double_scrolling_gap_key))
157→            }
158→
159→            searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.user_actions_controls_category_key))
160→        }
161→    }
162→}

content.text:
Perfect! I have successfully implemented the fix for the search functionality issue. Let me summarize what was done:

## Summary

### Problem Analysis
The issue was that "Backups" options were not appearing in the Settings search results when users searched for "back" or similar terms, while searching for "syn" correctly showed "Sync" options.

### Root Cause
In the `HeaderFragment.kt` file, the `configureSearchBar` method indexes various preference XML files to make them searchable using the `index()` method. However, the `preferences_backup_limits.xml` file was missing from this indexing list, which prevented any backup-related preferences from appearing in search results.

### Fix Applied
I added a single line to the `configureSearchBar` method at line 128 in `HeaderFragment.kt`:

```kotlin
index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)
```

This line was added after `index(R.xml.preferences_accessibility)`, following the exact same pattern used for all other preference screens.

### Why This Works
The search functionality uses the `SearchConfiguration` class to index:
- The screen titles (from `android:title`)
- Individual preference titles (from `android:title` on each preference)
- Preference summaries and other searchable metadata

The `preferences_backup_limits.xml` file contains:
- Screen title: "Backups" (`@string/button_backup`)
- Individual preferences for:
  - Backup help information
  - Minutes between automatic backups
  - Daily/Weekly/Monthly backups to keep

Now that this file is indexed, searching for terms like "back", "backup", "automatic", "daily", "weekly", or "monthly" will correctly return the relevant backup options, matching the behavior of the Sync screen.

### Verification
- No linter errors were introduced
- The change follows the existing pattern in the codebase
- The fix is minimal and targeted, affecting only the search indexing configuration
- All other preference screens continue to work as expected

The fix is complete and ready for testing!

110→        fun configureSearchBar(activity: AppCompatActivity, searchConfiguration: SearchConfiguration) {
111→            with(searchConfiguration) {
112→                setActivity(activity)
113→                setBreadcrumbsEnabled(true)
114→                setFuzzySearchEnabled(false)
115→                setHistoryEnabled(true)
116→
117→                index(R.xml.preferences_general)
118→                index(R.xml.preferences_reviewing)
119→                index(R.xml.preferences_sync)
120→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_sync_server)
121→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_sync)
122→                index(R.xml.preferences_notifications)
123→                index(R.xml.preferences_appearance)
124→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_buttons)
125→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_appearance)
126→                index(R.xml.preferences_controls)
127→                index(R.xml.preferences_accessibility)
128→            }
129→
130→            // Some preferences and categories are only shown conditionally,
131→            // so they should be searchable based on the same conditions
132→
133→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
134→            if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(activity)) {
135→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_dev_options)
136→                /** From [DevOptionsFragment.initSubscreen] */
137→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
138→                    searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.dev_options_enabled_by_user_key))
139→                }
140→            }
141→
142→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
143→            if (!AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
144→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_advanced)
145→            }
146→
147→            /** From [NotificationsSettingsFragment.initSubscreen] */
148→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
149→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_vibrate_key))
150→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_blink_key))
151→            }
152→
153→            /** From [AdvancedSettingsFragment.removeUnnecessaryAdvancedPrefs] */
154→            if (!CompatHelper.hasScrollKeys()) {
155→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.double_scrolling_gap_key))
156→            }
157→
158→            searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.user_actions_controls_category_key))
159→        }
160→    }
161→}

 33→class HeaderFragment : PreferenceFragmentCompat() {
 34→    private var selectedHeaderPreference: HeaderPreference? = null
 35→    private var selectedHeaderPreferenceKey: String = DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 36→    override fun onCreatePreferences(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, rootKey: String?) {
 37→        setPreferencesFromResource(R.xml.preference_headers, rootKey)
 38→
 39→        selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = savedInstanceState?.getString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF) ?: DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 40→
 41→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 42→
 43→        requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(R.string.pref_backup_limits_screen_key)
 44→            .title = CollectionManager.TR.preferencesBackups()
 45→
 46→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_advanced_screen_key).apply {
 47→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
 48→                isVisible = false
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→
 52→        if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(requireContext())) {
 53→            setDevOptionsVisibility(true)
 54→        }
 55→
 56→        configureSearchBar(
 57→            requireActivity() as AppCompatActivity,
 58→            requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key).searchConfiguration
 59→        )
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    private fun highlightHeaderPreference(headerPreference: HeaderPreference) {
 63→        if (!(activity as Preferences).hasLateralNavigation()) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→        selectedHeaderPreference?.setHighlighted(false)
 67→        // highlight the newly selected header
 68→        selectedHeaderPreference = headerPreference.apply {
 69→            setHighlighted(true)
 70→            selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = this.key
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    override fun onPreferenceTreeClick(preference: Preference): Boolean {
 75→        highlightHeaderPreference(preference as HeaderPreference)
 76→        return super.onPreferenceTreeClick(preference)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
 80→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
 81→        outState.putString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF, selectedHeaderPreferenceKey)
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    override fun onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 85→        super.onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState)
 86→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun onStart() {
 90→        super.onStart()
 91→        requireActivity().setTitle(R.string.settings)
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 95→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 96→        // use the same fragment container to search in case there is a navigation container
 97→        requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key)
 98→            .searchConfiguration
 99→            .setFragmentContainerViewId((view.parent as? ViewGroup)?.id ?: R.id.settings_container)
100→    }
101→
102→    fun setDevOptionsVisibility(isVisible: Boolean) {
103→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_dev_options_screen_key).isVisible = isVisible
104→    }
105→
106→    companion object {
107→        private const val KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF = "selected_header_pref"
108→        private const val DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER = "generalScreen"
109→
110→        fun configureSearchBar(activity: AppCompatActivity, searchConfiguration: SearchConfiguration) {
111→            with(searchConfiguration) {
112→                setActivity(activity)
113→                setBreadcrumbsEnabled(true)
114→                setFuzzySearchEnabled(false)
115→                setHistoryEnabled(true)
116→
117→                index(R.xml.preferences_general)
118→                index(R.xml.preferences_reviewing)
119→                index(R.xml.preferences_sync)
120→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_sync_server)
121→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_sync)
122→                index(R.xml.preferences_notifications)
123→                index(R.xml.preferences_appearance)
124→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_buttons)
125→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_appearance)
126→                index(R.xml.preferences_controls)
127→                index(R.xml.preferences_accessibility)
128→                index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)
129→            }
130→
131→            // Some preferences and categories are only shown conditionally,
132→            // so they should be searchable based on the same conditions
133→
134→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
135→            if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(activity)) {
136→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_dev_options)
137→                /** From [DevOptionsFragment.initSubscreen] */
138→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
139→                    searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.dev_options_enabled_by_user_key))
140→                }
141→            }
142→
143→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
144→            if (!AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
145→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_advanced)
146→            }
147→
148→            /** From [NotificationsSettingsFragment.initSubscreen] */
149→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
150→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_vibrate_key))
151→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_blink_key))
152→            }
153→
154→            /** From [AdvancedSettingsFragment.removeUnnecessaryAdvancedPrefs] */
155→            if (!CompatHelper.hasScrollKeys()) {
156→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.double_scrolling_gap_key))
157→            }
158→
159→            searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.user_actions_controls_category_key))
160→        }
161→    }
162→}
